title: Trait Implement
description: Define a Summary trait and implement it in multiple structs to share common behavior.
problemStatement:
Shared Behavior! Define a trait `Summary` with a method `summarize(&self) -> String`. Implement this trait for a `NewsArticle` struct that has a `headline` field.

**Requirement:** The method should return the headline followed by a string.
hints: Traits are similar to interfaces in other languages but can also have default method implementations.
